message.content:
# Hayat Life Care Website QA Analysis

## 1. Visual/Layout Issues
- The navigation menu items appear to be evenly spaced but may benefit from more consistent padding
- The "Book a Visit" button has a rounded design that contrasts with the more angular navigation items
- The statistics section (0+ Business Wings, 3 Katha Land Area, etc.) has inconsistent spacing between the numbers and their labels
- The floating chat button at bottom-right may obstruct content on smaller screens

## 2. Text Readability
- The main headline "HAYAT LIFE CARE" uses all caps which is readable but could be more distinctive
- The address "55 Katha Complex • O.R. Nizam Road" is overlaid on the image with good contrast
- The quote "One destination. Every need." uses italic styling which is appropriate for emphasis
- The statistics section uses a large font size that's easily readable

## 3. Spacing Problems
- The gap between the main image and the right-side information panel could be more consistent
- The spacing between the navigation items appears slightly uneven
- The vertical spacing between the statistics numbers and their labels varies (particularly between "3" and "KATHA LAND AREA")
- The distance between the quote and the preceding paragraph could be increased for better separation

## 4. Color Contrast Issues
- The dark overlay on the building image provides good contrast for the white text
- The teal/green color scheme has good contrast between light and dark variations
- The "Book a Visit" button has sufficient contrast between the orange background and white text
- The statistics section maintains good contrast between the white text and teal background

## 5. Truncation or Overflow
- No visible text truncation or overflow issues in the current viewport
- All text appears to fit within its containers properly
- The navigation menu items all display completely without wrapping
- The statistics numbers and labels are fully visible without overflow

## Additional Observations
- The Instagram link appears small and may be difficult to click on mobile devices
- The dark mode toggle icon is clear and distinguishable
- The overall layout is responsive and maintains its structure across different screen sizes
- The color scheme is consistent throughout the page
